name: Samitivej Public Company Limited
summary: Samitivej Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the hospital business in Thailand and internationally. The company operates through two segments, Hospital Operations and Other Businesses. It operates hospitals, as well as offers various programs and services for large corporations, embassies, and international schools. The company also provides asset management services for healthcare business; distributes health and cosmetics products; and operates a clinic. In addition, it engages in the facility management and investment businesses. The company was founded in 1979 and is based in Bangkok, Thailand. Samitivej Public Company Limited is a subsidiary of Bangkok Dusit Medical Services Public Company Limited.
